panel.title: Monitor Profiles
panel.no-profiles: No profiles saved. Open Monique to create one.
panel.not-installed: monique not found. Install Monique to use this plugin.

settings.title: Monique
settings.description: Switch monitor profiles from the bar and customize how it looks.
settings.show-profile-label-desc: Display the active profile name next to the icon in the bar
settings.active-color-desc: Color of the icon in the bar
settings.refresh-interval-desc: How often to poll for the active profile
